script: TOKEN=$(/home/azureuser/yoomd-appcatalog-token.sh); curl -s 'https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/appCatalogs/teamsApps?%24filter=distributionMethod%20eq%20%27organization%27' -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" | jq '[.value[] | {id, externalId, displayName}] | sort_by(.displayName)'; echo; echo '===== Locate gabriel + alejandro source files ====='; find /home /tmp -maxdepth 4 \( -iname '*gabriel*' -o -iname '*alejandro*' \) -type f 2>/dev/null | grep -E '\.(zip|json)$' | grep -v '\.bak\|\.requests\|\.responses' | head -20
